name: vitaecontext
description: Private, reusable career context and focused skills for grounded professional work.

interface.shortDescription: Keep career context and reuse it across grounded professional tasks.
interface.longDescription: Build and maintain private Career Context, then use focused skills for CV, GitHub, LinkedIn, portfolio, X, and detailed VitaeGraph work.
defaultPrompt: Build my private Career Context from the material I choose to share.
Audit my CV using my Career Context without inventing claims.
Help me choose the right VitaeContext skill for this career task.
